'''竏嘛-th-w-t''' ('''kavathwetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:longjump|longjump]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:longjump|longjump]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘛-th-w-t
|-
! Lemma
| kavathwetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivathwetoko|thivathwetoko]] || [[word:jivathwetoko|jivathwetoko]] || [[word:shivathwetoko|shivathwetoko]] || [[word:kivathwetoko|kivathwetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvathwetoko|thuthuvathwetoko]] || [[word:jujuvathwetoko|jujuvathwetoko]] || [[word:shushuvathwetoko|shushuvathwetoko]] || [[word:kukuvathwetoko|kukuvathwetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvathwetoko|thuvathwetoko]] || [[word:juvathwetoko|juvathwetoko]] || [[word:shuvathwetoko|shuvathwetoko]] || [[word:kuvathwetoko|kuvathwetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvathwetoko|thuvathwetoko]] || [[word:juvathwetoko|juvathwetoko]] || [[word:shuvathwetoko|shuvathwetoko]] || [[word:kuvathwetoko|kuvathwetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevathwetoko|thevathwetoko]] || [[word:jevathwetoko|jevathwetoko]] || [[word:shevathwetoko|shevathwetoko]] || [[word:kevathwetoko|kevathwetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovathwetoko|thothovathwetoko]] || [[word:jojovathwetoko|jojovathwetoko]] || [[word:shoshovathwetoko|shoshovathwetoko]] || [[word:kokovathwetoko|kokovathwetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovathwetoko|thovathwetoko]] || [[word:jovathwetoko|jovathwetoko]] || [[word:shovathwetoko|shovathwetoko]] || [[word:kovathwetoko|kovathwetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovathwetoko|thovathwetoko]] || [[word:jovathwetoko|jovathwetoko]] || [[word:shovathwetoko|shovathwetoko]] || [[word:kovathwetoko|kovathwetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦvathwetoko|thﾃｦvathwetoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦvathwetoko|jﾃｦvathwetoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦvathwetoko|shﾃｦvathwetoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦvathwetoko|kﾃｦvathwetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavathwetoko|thathavathwetoko]] || [[word:jajavathwetoko|jajavathwetoko]] || [[word:shashavathwetoko|shashavathwetoko]] || [[word:kakavathwetoko|kakavathwetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavathwetoko|thavathwetoko]] || [[word:javathwetoko|javathwetoko]] || [[word:shavathwetoko|shavathwetoko]] || [[word:kavathwetoko|kavathwetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavathwetoko|thavathwetoko]] || [[word:javathwetoko|javathwetoko]] || [[word:shavathwetoko|shavathwetoko]] || [[word:kavathwetoko|kavathwetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavathwetithi|shavathwetithi]] || [[word:shavathwetiji|shavathwetiji]] || [[word:shavathwetishi|shavathwetishi]] || [[word:shavathwetiki|shavathwetiki]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavathwetotho|shavathwetotho]] || [[word:shavathwetojo|shavathwetojo]] || [[word:shavathwetosho|shavathwetosho]] || [[word:shavathwetoko|shavathwetoko]]
|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavathwetﾃｯf|shavathwetﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathwetﾃｯf|shavathwetﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathwetﾃｯf|shavathwetﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathwetﾃｯf|shavathwetﾃｯf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavathwetﾃｯf|shavathwetﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathwetﾃｯf|shavathwetﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathwetﾃｯf|shavathwetﾃｯf]] || [[word:shavathwetﾃｯf|shavathwetﾃｯf]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavathwetatha|shavathwetatha]] || [[word:shavathwetaja|shavathwetaja]] || [[word:shavathwetasha|shavathwetasha]] || [[word:shavathwetaka|shavathwetaka]]
|-

|-

|}
